base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of underground_underwater_tileset — a tile from 1990 super mario world. Underground + Underwater (Vanilla Dome / Soda Lake) tiles. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Underground + Underwater (Vanilla Dome / Soda Lake) tiles
